flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clinton Essex Warren Washington BOCES fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (46 → 31).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clinton Essex Warren Washington BOCES fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (92.9% → 81.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clinton Essex Warren Washington BOCES fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clinton Essex Warren Washington BOCES rose 38% between 2006 and 2009 (54.3% → 75.0%).
